response.global_summary: A video featuring VTuber Yukihana Lamy discussing her 2025 birthday merchandise and announcing a new, full-animation music video, followed by a live 3D performance of her song 'з„Ўйҷҗвҳ…иҰҒеЎһгҒ«гӮөгғҗгӮӨгғҗгғј!'.

scenes.description: Talk segment where Yukihana Lamy presents her 2025 birthday goods (acrylic stand, trainer, plushie keychain, towel, postcard) and announces a new song and MV.
Yukihana Lamy performs the song 'з„Ўйҷҗвҳ…иҰҒеЎһгҒ«гӮөгғҗгӮӨгғҗгғј!' on a 3D stage with two backup dancers.
